title: Father of Australian girl shot by police while visiting Pakistan demands justice
summary_full: Hania Ahmed, 9, died after Punjab police opened fire on suspected robbers as well as her family in ChakwalGet our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcastThe father of a nine-year-old Australian girl killed in Pakistan on holiday has demanded justice and to “reduce the harm” of a controversial new police wing whose officers opened fire with machine guns in response to a robbery.Hania Ahmed and her family were visiting her great-uncle Ali Ejaz last week at his home in Chakwal, Punjab province. Continue reading...
